name: Harpie's Feather Storm
name_jp: ハーピィの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>羽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>根</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>吹雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふぶき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a WIND Winged Beast monster: Until the end of this turn, negate any monster effects your opponent activates. If you control a "Harpie" monster, you can activate this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can add 1 "Harpie's Feather Duster" from your Deck or GY to your hand.
eff: If you control a WIND Winged Beast monster: Until the end of this turn, negate any monster effects your opponent activates. If you control a "Harpie" monster, you can activate this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can add 1 "Harpie's Feather Duster" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Can be activated from the hand
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
